properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v3 v4 v7 v3 v8 v9 v10

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: It's not just about the manger Where the baby lay It's not all about the angels Who sing for him that day

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It's not all about the shepherds Or the bright and shining star It's not all about the wise men Who travelled from afar

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It's about the cross It's about my sin It's about how Jesus came to be born once So that we could be born again

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: It's about the stone That was rolled away So that you and I could have real life someday It's about the cross

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: It's not just about the good things In this life I've done It's not all about the treasures Or the trophies that I've won

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: It's not about the righteousness That I've find within It's all about His precious blood That save me from my sin

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: The beginning of the story Is wonderful and great But it's the ending that can save you And that's why we celebrate

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: It's about God's love Nailed to a tree It's about how every drop of blood That flowed from Him when it should have been me

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: It's about the stone That was rolled away So that you and I could have real life someday So that you and I could have real life someday

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: It's about the cross (it's about the cross) It's about the cross It's about the cross
